name: Stir Fried Chicken and Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Skinned and deboned the chicken breasts. Cut into cubes.
2. Place in a bowl and combine with honey and curry powder until mixed through.
3. Stir in apple slices.
4. Heat oil in a heavy skillet over high heat.
5. Saute celery for 1 minute.
6. Add the apple mixture and stir fry for 3-4 minutes, just until chicken is no longer pink.
7. Add raisins and chopped parsley. Stir well.
8. Serve over rice.
